{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Elysia symbol
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The symbol of [[Elysia]] is a winged [[sword]], point-down, with a rising sun in the background.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
